name: Lactiplantibacillus plantarum (WCFS1)
shortDescription: A GRAS probiotic lactic acid bacterium that persists in the gut better than L. lactis. Robust to gut bile and acid, making it a strong chassis for ingestible clinical/gut biosensors and fermented-food monitoring.

safety.grasBasis: EFSA QPS; widespread probiotic and food-fermentation use.
safety.biocontainment: Auxotrophy (e.g. alr/dapA) and food-grade containment demonstrated.
safety.notes: Gram-positive, bile/acid-tolerant; better gut persistence than L. lactis.

engineering.crisprTools: CRISPRi and CRISPR base editing demonstrated in lactobacilli.
